description_long: This object is a visually striking book with a semi-transparent blue cover and pages, giving it a modern and somewhat ethereal appearance. The cover features a bold, abstract black-and-white pattern with scattered gold accents, adding a sense of urban style and vibrancy. The book is open, revealing several blue-tinted pages that appear to be made of a plastic or synthetic material, with some white text or graphics faintly visible through the translucency. A black strap with a gold clasp is attached to one side, possibly serving as a closure or decorative element. The overall construction suggests a blend of traditional book form with contemporary, possibly waterproof or durable materials. This book would stand out in an urban environment, both as a functional item and as a statement accessory.
description: A modern book with semi-transparent blue pages, a bold black-and-white patterned cover, and gold accents, featuring a black strap with a gold clasp.
description_view_0: Top-down view showing the open book with blue translucent pages and the black strap with gold clasp on the left.
description_view_1: Angled side view highlighting the layered blue pages and the edge of the patterned cover.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the full black-and-white patterned cover with gold accents and the strap extending outward.
description_view_3: Opposite angled side view focusing on the blue translucent pages and the book's thickness.
attribute_cover_illustration: The front cover features an abstract, high-contrast black-and-white pattern with scattered gold accents, creating a dynamic and modern visual effect. The design is bold and graphic, with no figurative imagery or traditional illustration elements.
